output.summary: Successfully extracted .modal-close-btn CSS from resources/css/screen/swiper.css to blocks/TestimonialsCarousel/TestimonialsCarousel.css. The @keyframes carousel-nav-gradient-sweep remains in swiper.css as it is shared between .carousel-nav-btn and .modal-close-btn. Both files compile into the same css/screen.css bundle, so the keyframe reference resolves correctly.

filesModified.purpose: Removed .modal-close-btn styles (lines 96-144) and updated @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block to only reference .carousel-nav-btn::before instead of both .carousel-nav-btn::before and .modal-close-btn::before. Kept @keyframes carousel-nav-gradient-sweep since it is shared.

filesCreated.purpose: New block-specific CSS file containing all .modal-close-btn styles including base styles, ::before pseudo-element with gradient animation, hover states, disabled state, focus-visible ring, and prefers-reduced-motion override. Converted from @apply directives to plain CSS to avoid Tailwind reference issues.

warnings: Asset size warnings for js/editor.js (325 KiB) - pre-existing

phpChanges.reason: CSS-only refactor. The HTML class 'modal-close-btn' remains unchanged in TestimonialsCarousel.php

technicalNotes: Initially attempted to use @apply directives with @reference "tailwindcss" but encountered errors with custom theme colors (border-charcoal, text-charcoal)
Converted all CSS to plain CSS using CSS custom properties (var(--color-white), var(--color-charcoal)) instead of Tailwind utilities
The @keyframes carousel-nav-gradient-sweep definition stays in swiper.css because both .carousel-nav-btn (in swiper.css) and .modal-close-btn (in block CSS) reference it
Both CSS files are bundled into the same css/screen.css output by webpack, so the keyframe reference from the block CSS resolves correctly
The prefers-reduced-motion override for .modal-close-btn::before is now in the block CSS file, while the .carousel-nav-btn::before override remains in swiper.css
qaVerificationNeeded: Modal close button renders with correct white border and text on dark modal backdrop
Hover state triggers gradient sweep animation using the shared @keyframes
No visual regression on carousel nav buttons (.carousel-nav-btn) which remain in swiper.css
